# Creator-style demo video

## When to use

Use on social platforms.

## Why it works

Native style beats polished ad feel.

## Mechanism

Feels like explanation, not corporate interruption.

## Required inputs

Phone/screen capture, honest demo, hook.

## When not to use

If audience needs enterprise polish.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Thumbstop, video completion, clicks.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
